_readme: FEASIBILITY-SYNTHESIS-V6 assumption block ASM-1840..1846 — EMITTED by the synthesis role (synthesis-2, 2026-07-12) for central registration by the coordinator; registry/assumptions.jsonl is NOT touched by this build (same discipline as the 1830..1836 block).
Range 1840-1849 verified free at emission time (max id in registry/assumptions.jsonl = ASM-1836; no ASM-184x reference anywhere in the tree); 1840-1846 used, 1847-1849 left free.

Scope: the programme-level feasibility state recorded by docs/next/feasibility-synthesis-v6.md, which supersedes feasibility-synthesis-v5.md (and its state rows ASM-1380-family framing) as the standing synthesis. Nothing here alters any frozen record, verdict, or audit; every row inherits its source experiments' riders (self-authored corpus, coverage 0.3542 at molecules-v0, PROVISIONAL-ON-LLM-PROXY where applicable) verbatim.

rows.claim: Feasibility-synthesis-v6 CORRECTNESS state: INCONCLUSIVE-PENDING. Licensed constituents: verdict-grade audit-confirmed authored-content lift (f2b-transfer +0.2507, endorsement 320/333; DECONF-B delta_align +0.2697, GS-A-kernel identity 1.0 — value in item-aligned content, no kernel-specific runtime structure measured) and the RULES-1 CPU certificate (engine 858/858 vs third-party gold, stated/entailed C_dec 1.0/0.0 — machinery non-inertness only). Open and UNINSTRUMENTED, not killed: kernel-specific structure (knull ablation never run), engine-verify-retry host lift (three instrument failures culminating in rules-1-c INSTRUMENT-INVALID; no valid carrier at the current operating point), typing soundness (g2/g2-import/g2-import-v2 all instrument-invalid or pilot-stopped; human panel pending). No programme feasibility conclusion follows from any constituent.
rows.rationale: Records the post-v5 correctness state without converting content or certificate results into thesis verdicts, and fixes the v6 discipline that uninstrumented affirmative quantities are UNMEASURED in both directions, never 'adverse' and never 'killed'.

rows.claim: Feasibility-synthesis-v6 EFFICIENCY state: INCONCLUSIVE-PENDING on ZERO live data — no experiment whose primary endpoint is an efficiency quantity has ever produced a valid grade (noninferiority_vs_r3=false is a not-shown, not a datum for; CASC-0-prime instrument-invalid; rules-1-c s3 unevaluable). DDC T0 is in flight as the thesis's first live execution. First-datum claim caps, fixed before any number exists: ddc0 licenses only admission/non-admission of kernel-aligned directions (gates ddc1's aligned arm; no ability/efficiency/correctness claim); ddc1 at most 'kernel-guided direction choice beats magnitude/random at matched sparsity on SmolLM2-135M/360M BASE, public benchmarks, training-free' — sign not slope; a TOST-equivalent ddc1 is a valid adverse datum at that scope only. Under every DDC branch, parity vs a larger host and lifecycle economics remain separate unaddressed legs and EFFICIENCY remains short of a thesis verdict.
rows.rationale: Prevents the first efficiency datum, whichever way it lands, from being reported beyond its pre-registered scope, and makes the zero-data status of the thesis explicit rather than implied.

rows.claim: Correctness-track instrument ledger, verified at source: the deflationary/deterministic-channel instruments are five-for-five valid (f2b-transfer PASS audited; DECONF-B PASS audited; RULES-1 CPU certificate; DECONF-A1; the g2-import-v2 pilot-stop machinery itself), while the affirmative judgment-channel instruments are zero-for-five (rules-1 VOID — all arms 0.000 including the oracle arm; rules-1-b superseded pre-final-phase — form-dead surface, pilot A5 0/24; rules-1-c INSTRUMENT-INVALID — engagement_valid FALSE, every A3 row attempts=1, A3 identical to c1 on all 2,574 cells, URN/word type mismatch atop the 2-option leak-vacuity dilemma; g2-import v1 kappa_A3 0.286; g2-import-v2 pilot #2 AC1 0.6222 < 0.65 with kappa exactly 0.0000, full run never launched). Reusable instrument facts: ENTITY-form host floors A5 0.944 / A7 1.000 / A1 0.703 at chance 0.5; padding non-neutrality +0.171.
rows.rationale: Fixes the verified failure ledger the v6 synthesis reasons from, so later documents cite one measured record instead of re-deriving it.

rows.claim: V6 reading discipline for the instrument ledger: the correctness gap is treated as an INSTRUMENTATION gap before an evidence gap. The assessment's explanatory weighting (scale-artifact 45% / design-space 40% / genuinely-hard 15%) is carried as SUBJECTIVE opinion, binding on nothing and never a premise. Promotion rule, fixed in advance: if the deflationary/affirmative asymmetry persists through VALID instruments (a pilot-validated rules-2 campaign and a human-gold g2 panel), the genuinely-hard reading is promoted to primary in the next synthesis; a single valid affirmative result instead re-opens the attribution chain (knull analog mandatory before any kernel-specific wording).
rows.rationale: Pre-commits how the next valid results update the framing, so the synthesis verdict wording cannot drift opportunistically after outcomes are known.

rows.claim: SCALE-1 S0 (10k rung) state as carried by v6: the deterministic import-vectoriser's crosstalk model holds at scale (disjoint-pair sigma within 3% of 1/sqrt(D) at D in {8192,512,576}; sqrt(2 ln m / D) a respected upper envelope at m=10^4; byte-determinism verified), and four measured blockers stand: WordNet-only typing yields 0% identity/dependence so the 0.95 UFO-typing gate is unreachable in principle on this source; exact O(m^2) cleanup is infeasible at 1M (~324 CPU-h) making the ANN + >=0.99 recall gate mandatory between 100k and 1M; the SemCor selection rule exhausts at 27,210; duplicate structural mass (20.1% of records, worsening down the tail) — not crosstalk — is the binding margin constraint. All figures scoped to kot-enc-import/*, never construction B. Thesis-relevant demonstrations remain at <100 concepts (84 g2 slots; closed kinship inventory; coverage 0.3542 at molecules-v0): the scale barrier-not-result backdrop stands.
rows.rationale: Records that S0 qualified the substrate and named the machinery gaps, and that neither S0 nor S1 can by design yield thesis evidence.

rows.claim: V6 minimal path to defensible scoped verdicts, with branch wording fixed before results: (1) rules-2 REWORK-3 with a passed blocking instrument pilot at the operating point (protocol ASM-1830..1836), GPU pending maintainer issue #24, plus its knull-closure analog as the mandatory second half of any positive — valid positive => GO at scope ('engine-materialised entailments are internalisable by a small host', kernel-specificity still pending knull); valid null => NO-GO for the train-time slot at scope; another instrument failure => still inconclusive with the hard-thesis weighting promoted. (2) g2: exactly one bounded v2.2 proxy attempt under the ASM-1825 pre-commitment (second AC1 fail retires the proxy pair), then the two-human blind panel on the 84 slots as sole adoption authority — human A3 >= 34/84 => GO for a bounded advisory soft-typing shard only; < 34/84 => NO-GO at this scope; human split on residual items => inconclusive on soundness but a finding: the rendering, not the judges, resists crisp adjudication. (3) DDC ddc0 -> ddc1 per ASM-1841 caps. (4) Scale S1 under the de-risked plan (pre-registered selection + duplicate policy before vectorise; stratified human typing audit; ANN >= 0.99 recall gate) — machinery qualification only, no thesis GO/NO-GO available by design.
rows.rationale: A plan choice, not evidence: fixes the fewest-experiments ordering and the GO/NO-GO/inconclusive licence per branch in advance, and defers the slot decision itself to the maintainer's #24.

rows.claim: Direction-only expectation: the ASM-1845 four-experiment path suffices to move both theses from INCONCLUSIVE-PENDING to defensible scoped verdicts (correctness: all three open quantities under valid instruments; efficiency: first signed data), with the residual distance to full thesis verdicts being scope (natural-input reach, coverage growth, generality beyond kinship, parity and lifecycle economics) rather than instrumentation. Never a premise; load-bearing for nothing.
rows.rationale: Makes the synthesis's forward bet explicit and falsifiable rather than implicit.
rows.resolution_path: rules-2 pilot + campaign + knull analog; g2 v2.2 pilot branch then the two-human 84-slot panel; ddc0 admission then ddc1 grade; S1 gate outcomes — the next synthesis (v7) resolves this row against whichever of these has landed
